examples: The technique Mr. Wilson uses most often is to juxtapose things for dramatic effect.
He tried to juxtapose the photos of his girlfriend on the desk to show his love.
Juxtapose that against what happens when you are out of work and searching - nobody is calling.
Juxtapose that with Chrysler's provocative "Imported from Detroit" message and the exceptional selection of Eminem as spokesperson.
And unlike many museum exhibitions of recent material, it doesn't juxtapose such pieces with related historic objects and doesn't identify the tribal affiliations of some artists.
